title: B's NorthCompass
description: This plugin gives you a compass on the top of your screen.
body:
This plugin puts a compass on the top of your screen using a boss bar.

![Compass](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aaae6b708ffda826d6f6f16e534f80ab75b1f146.gif)

**Why do you might want to use this?**
1. Easy to install!
2. Easy to understand!
3. Dinamic and smooth!
4. No more F3!

_(Note: after reload, you may need to reconnect for the compass to appear!)_
